Package org.eventb.internal.ui.eventbeditor.operations

Class Move

java.lang.Object
org.eclipse.core.commands.operations.AbstractOperation
org.eventb.internal.ui.eventbeditor.operations.AbstractEventBOperation
org.eventb.internal.ui.eventbeditor.operations.Move
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.eclipse.core.commands.operations.IUndoableOperation
public class Move extends AbstractEventBOperation
This class handles the move operation of internal elements.

Two cases are considered in this implementation:

  • when element source and destination parents are the same, there is no risk of naming collision,
  • when element source and destination parents differ, there could be a risk of naming collision, thus a fresh element name is computed. The old name of the element is then kept to allow conservative undo and redo operations.

      public void doExecute(org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IAdaptable info) throws RodinDBException
      Fresh name is computed here if necessary, as it depends on the move operation context (i.e. it can't be computed at construction).
